name_en: Style No.6821- Summer New 🌷MCM🌷 Original Patricia Visetos Mini Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in making luxury goods. The bag front is decorated with a shiny laurel lock, an ideal choice for creating a charming look. Dimensions: 7 x 18 x 18
